zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cromwell於大約1264年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾時，她的父親Ralph Cromwell52歲，母親Mazere Marmion21歲。她和Alexander de Freville至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1339年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cromwell was born about 1264, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Cromwell, was 52 and her mother, Mazere Marmion, was 21. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Alexander de Freville. She died about 1339, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cromwell est née environ 1264, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Cromwell, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Mazere Marmion, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Alexander de Freville. Elle est décédée environ 1339, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Cromwell um 1264 in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Cromwell 52 und ihre Mutter Mazere Marmion 21. Sie hatte mit Alexander de Freville mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1339 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cromwellが約1264年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルで生まれた時，父Ralph Cromwellは52歳，母Mazere Marmionは21歳であった。彼女はAlexander de Frevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1339年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cromwell(이)가 대략 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Cromwell(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mazere Marmion(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Alexander de Freville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cromwell родилась около 1264 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Cromwell было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Mazere Marmion, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Alexander de Freville. Она умерла около 1339 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
